title: Your profile
description: Saved locally to profile.json — sensitive values never enter the chat.

blocks.text:
## Set up your profile
Everything below is written to `profile.json` at the root of this project. The **password and passport number are secrets**: the agent only learns the field names, never the values.

fields.name: password
fields.label: Password
fields.help: At least 8 characters. Stored in profile.json only.

fields.name: passportNumber
fields.label: Passport number
fields.help: Treated as a secret — masked in the browser, redacted from all agent output.

fields.name: bio
fields.label: Quick bio
fields.placeholder: A couple of sentences about you…
